subcodes.title: Words spoken to Baha'is of the World at Bahji, 1913-12-25
subcodes.first_line: You are all welcome. How are you? It is part of the Divine Wisdom that I should keep silent for a time! All that was required of me
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @bringing forth results; fruit, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
